name: tag
description: The tag which is assigned by classifier extension.

name: tag_type
description: The type of tag matching (IP, Domain, Cache, etc.).

name: ech
description: Encrypted Client Hello. The tag is presented only when ECH exists, but SNI doesn't exist.

name: ftp_data
description: FTP data trasnmission.

name: dns_response_name
description: Processed dns response name - concatenated labels, resolving offsets, etc.

name: ja3
description: The fingerprinting the client's TLS handshake (Client Hello).

name: ja3s
description: The fingerprinting the server's response (Server Hello).

name: ja3_hash
description: MD5 hash of JA3. Format: TLSVersion,Ciphers,Extensions,EllipticCurves,EllipticCurvePointFormats.

name: ja3_md5
description: MD5 hash of JA3. Format: TLSVersion,Ciphers,Extensions,EllipticCurves,EllipticCurvePointFormats.

name: ja3s_md5
description: MD5 hash of JA3S. Format: TLSVersion,Cipher,Extensions.

name: http2_header
description: The http/2 protocol header block field: name:value.

name: http2_push_promise_header
description: The http/2 protocol push-promise block field: name:value.

name: http2_continuation_header
description: The http/2 protocol continuation block field: name:value.

name: http_authorization_credentials
description: Base64 decoded value of Proxy-Authorization header value.

name: tls_certificate_common_name
description: The CommonName certificate field.

name: tls_certificate_general_dns_name
description: The dNSName certificate field. Belongs to extension section.

name: protocol_path
description: Protocol path string (hierarchical chain of protocol that are used in a session).

name: bitrate
description: The bitrate is a measure of how much data is transferred over a network in a given period of time. Measured in bits per second (bps).

name: average_packet_size
description: Average packet size of processed packets.

name: inter_arrival_time
description: Inter-arrival Time is the difference in time between the arrival of two consecutive packets at a receiver. Measured in nanoseconds. For one flow packet avg iat is 0.

name: flow_start_time
description: Timestamp of the first flow packet..

name: flow_last_activity_time
description: Timestamp of the last flow packet.

name: flow_duration
description: The flow duration time.
